fields.title: E-Commerce Platform
fields.description: A full-featured e-commerce platform with product management, cart, payments via Stripe, and an admin dashboard. Supports multiple vendors and real-time inventory tracking.

fields.title: Task Management API
fields.description: RESTful API for a collaborative task manager with JWT auth, role-based permissions, real-time notifications via WebSockets, and full API documentation.
fields.tech_stack: Django REST Framework, JWT, WebSockets, Swagger

fields.title: Analytics Dashboard
fields.description: Real-time analytics dashboard with interactive charts, custom date ranges, CSV export, and automated reporting. Processes thousands of events per minute.
Lead development of microservices architecture serving 500K+ users. Reduced API response time by 40% through caching and query optimization.
Built the core product from scratch using Django and React. Implemented CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and deployed on AWS.
Delivered 20+ web projects for small businesses. Specialized in Django CMS solutions, REST APIs, and performance optimization.
